sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data_map MAP(INT, INT), value FLOAT, description VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, map([1, 2, 3], [5, NULL, 15]), 5.0, 'test entry');
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (2, map([], []), 2.5, 'empty map');
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (3, map([10, 20], [40, 50]), NULL, 'null value');
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (4, map([100, 200], [1, 2]), 6.5, 'boundary value');
SELECT id, map_values(data_map) AS map_vals, value / 2 AS half_value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, (value * 3 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL)) AS normalized_value FROM test_table WHERE data_map IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, map_values(data_map), value / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS safe_division FROM test_table WHERE description LIKE 'test%';
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY description) AS description_count, map_values(data_map) AS map_vals FROM test_table HAVING description_count > 1;
WITH temp AS (SELECT id, map_values(data_map) AS map_vals FROM test_table WHERE value > 3) SELECT id / 2.0 AS halved_id, map_vals FROM temp WHERE halved_id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value, map_values(data_map) AS map_vals FROM test_table WHERE value / COALESCE(NULLIF(value, 0), 1) > 2.0;
